name: salazzle
flavor_text: For some reason, only females have been found. It creates a reverse harem of male Salandit that it lives with.

moves.name: fire-lash
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Defense by one stage after inflicting damage.

moves.name: pound
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: scratch
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: disable
moves.effect: Disables the target’s last used move for 1-8 turns.

moves.name: ember
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.

moves.name: smog
moves.effect: Has a 40% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: poison-gas
moves.effect: Poisons the target.

moves.name: swagger
moves.effect: Raises the target’s Attack by two stages and confuses the target.

moves.name: torment
moves.effect: Prevents the target from using the same move twice in a row.

moves.name: captivate
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by two stages if it’s the opposite gender.

moves.name: dragon-rage
moves.effect: Inflicts 40 points of damage.

moves.name: poison-fang
moves.effect: Has a 50% chance to badly poison the target.

moves.name: sweet-scent
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s evasion by one stage.

moves.name: double-slap
moves.effect: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.

moves.name: flame-burst
moves.effect: Deals splash damage to Pokémon next to the target.

moves.name: incinerate
moves.effect: Destroys the target’s held berry.

moves.name: acid-spray
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Defense by two stages.

moves.name: acrobatics
moves.effect: Has double power if the user has no held item.

moves.name: agility
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages.

moves.name: attract
moves.effect: Target falls in love if it has the opposite gender, and has a 50% chance to refuse attacking the user.

moves.name: beat-up
moves.effect: Hits once for every conscious Pokémon the trainer has.

moves.name: body-slam
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: breaking-swipe
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage after inflicting damage.

moves.name: burning-jealousy
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: confide
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: cross-poison
moves.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit and a 10% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: double-team
moves.effect: Raises the user’s evasion by one stage.

moves.name: dragon-claw
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: dragon-dance
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack and Speed by one stage.

moves.name: dragon-pulse
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: dragon-tail
moves.effect: Ends wild battles.  Forces trainers to switch Pokémon.

moves.name: encore
moves.effect: Forces the target to repeat its last used move every turn for 2 to 6 turns.

moves.name: endeavor
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s HP to equal the user’s.

moves.name: endure
moves.effect: Prevents the user’s HP from lowering below 1 this turn.

moves.name: facade
moves.effect: Power doubles if user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned.

moves.name: fake-tears
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Defense by two stages.

moves.name: fire-blast
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.

moves.name: fire-fang
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to burn the target and a 10% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: flame-charge
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Raises the user’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: flamethrower
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.

moves.name: flare-blitz
moves.effect: User takes 1/3 the damage inflicted in recoil.  Has a 10% chance to burn the target.

moves.name: fling
moves.effect: Throws held item at the target; power depends on the item.

moves.name: foul-play
moves.effect: Calculates damage with the target’s attacking stat.

moves.name: frustration
moves.effect: Power increases as happiness decreases, up to a maximum of 102.

moves.name: giga-impact
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: gunk-shot
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: heat-wave
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.

moves.name: helping-hand
moves.effect: Ally’s next move inflicts half more damage.

moves.name: hidden-power
moves.effect: Power and type depend upon user’s IVs.  Power can range from 30 to 70.

moves.name: hyper-beam
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: hyper-voice
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: iron-tail
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: knock-off
moves.effect: Target drops its held item.

moves.name: leech-life
moves.effect: Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.

moves.name: mud-slap
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.

moves.name: nasty-plot
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Special Attack by two stages.

moves.name: overheat
moves.effect: Lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages after inflicting damage.

moves.name: payback
moves.effect: Power is doubled if the target has already moved this turn.

moves.name: poison-jab
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: poison-tail
moves.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit and a 10% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: protect
moves.effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.

moves.name: rest
moves.effect: User sleeps for two turns, completely healing itself.

moves.name: return
moves.effect: Power increases with happiness, up to a maximum of 102.

moves.name: round
moves.effect: Has double power if it’s used more than once per turn.

moves.name: scale-shot
moves.effect: Boosts the user’s Speed and lowers their Defense by one stage after inflicting damage two to five times in a row.

moves.name: scary-face
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.

moves.name: shadow-claw
moves.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: skitter-smack
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: sleep-talk
moves.effect: Randomly uses one of the user’s other three moves.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: sludge-bomb
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: sludge-wave
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: snore
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: substitute
moves.effect: Transfers 1/4 of the user’s max HP into a doll, protecting the user from further damage or status changes until it breaks.

moves.name: sunny-day
moves.effect: Changes the weather to sunny for five turns.

moves.name: swift
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: take-down
moves.effect: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

moves.name: taunt
moves.effect: For the next few turns, the target can only use damaging moves.

moves.name: thief
moves.effect: Takes the target’s item.

moves.name: thunder-wave
moves.effect: Paralyzes the target.

moves.name: toxic
moves.effect: Badly poisons the target, inflicting more damage every turn.

moves.name: toxic-spikes
moves.effect: Scatters poisoned spikes, poisoning opposing Pokémon that switch in.

moves.name: venom-drench
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack, Special Attack, and Speed by one stage if it is poisoned.

moves.name: venoshock
moves.effect: Inflicts double damage if the target is Poisoned.

moves.name: will-o-wisp
moves.effect: Burns the target.

moves.name: corrosive-gas
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: covet
moves.effect: Takes the target’s item.

moves.name: laser-focus
moves.effect: Guarantees a critical hit with the user’s next move.

moves.name: snatch
moves.effect: Steals the target’s move, if it’s self-targeted.

abilitiesDetailed.name: corrosion
abilitiesDetailed.effect: This Pokémon can inflict poison on Poison and Steel Pokémon.

abilitiesDetailed.name: oblivious
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Prevents infatuation and protects against captivate.
